rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH TIERNEY VS. NASIR JAVAID et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-539063 WITH CASE CGC-13-531997
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 1, 2014, line 1. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH TIERNEY and 376 CASTRO STREET, LLC's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-539063 WITH CASE CGC-13-531997 GRANTED. Non-opposition filed. Cases are consolidated for all purposes. Case CGC-13-531997 shall be the lead case. Prevailing party prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STERLING HEATLEY, AN INDIVIDUAL VS. SF CORNERS LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re Contempt;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 1, 2014, line 3. Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re Contempt OFF CALENDAR. Moving party was unable to serve the respondent with the moving papers per the Court order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STERLING HEATLEY, AN INDIVIDUAL VS. SF CORNERS LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Receiver'S Motion To Increase Borrowing Limit
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 1, 2014, line 3. Receiver's Motion To Increase Borrowing Limit Hearing Required. Defendants must bring to the hearing all items described in paragraph 23 of August 22, 2014 order. Defendants and property managers, hired by the defendants prior to receivership, must present declarations under penalty of perjury regarding receipt/non-receipt of rental payments for August and September 2014 from tenants of each residential and commercial units, so that receiver may institute collection/unlawful detainer actions if necessary and proper. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JERROLD JACOBY ET AL VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CALIFORNIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 1, 2014, line 4. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. First Amended Petition filed September 26, 2014. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOEL ELLIOTT VS. MICHAEL GALLIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment And Recall The Srit Of Possession
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 1, 2014, line 4. DEFENDANTs MICHAEL GALLIN and AARON MARXMILLER's Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment And Recall The Writ Of Possession GRANTED, subject to (1) Plaintiff presenting a courtesy copy of the opposition no later than October 1, 2014 by 9:00 a.m.; (2) Defendant filing an answer no later than October 6, 2014; and (3) Defendant posting $4,310.04 with the Court no later October 6, 2014. No answer shall be filed if posting has not been made. = (501/REQ)
